chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1245 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5699/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.12.2024 Mr. Ahmed Farhaj, advocate and Mr. Anas Makhdoom, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Fahad Arijo, advocate for the respondents No.2 & 3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Kafil Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Through this petition, an order in original issued by the Sindh Revenue Board dated 22.01.2019 has been assailed in the writ jurisdiction of this Court; while willfully abjuring the entire statutory hierarchy prescribed by law. Notices were issued in 2019; ad interim orders were obtained in 2019, halting the entire statutory process, subsisted till date; however, notwithstanding the foregoing the order sheet demonstrates that no substantial progress has taken place herein ever since. No case could be discerned to sanction the adjudication of an order in original in writ jurisdiction, as any such permission would render the entire statutory appellate / remedial scheme to be otiose. Even otherwise, learned counsel could not justify the direct recourse to writ jurisdiction in the manifest presence of an adequate alternate remedy. In summation, no case has been set forth before us to merit the invocation of the discretionary1 writ jurisdiction of this Court; therefore, this petition is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA 1Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs.

In summation, no case has been set forth before us to merit the invocation of the discretionary1 writ jurisdiction of this Court; therefore, this petition is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA 1Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105.
